title: UAE News: Up to 50% tax credit announced for businesses under new Tax Incentive Rules 2026
summary_full: The UAE Ministry of Finance has introduced a significant tax incentive. Businesses can now claim up to 50% tax credit on research and development spending. This move aims to reduce the tax burden for innovative companies. It will strengthen the UAE's position as a global hub for technology and advanced industries.
